name: rit-plugin
description: Rit's project-guidance, grounded-explanation, and evidence-based learning workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Rit's guidance, explanation, and learning workflows.
interface.longDescription: Project guidance, grounded technical explanation, and evidence-based long-term learning in one personal workflow bundle.
defaultPrompt: Use $setup-agent-guidance to initialize durable project guidance.
Use $grounded-explainer to explain a concept from a concrete scenario.
Use $learn to build durable capability through evidence-based practice.
